professional_leadership: Promoted to Tech Lead, owning architecture, delivery, and technical direction for a multi-service healthcare platform with leadership experience across 10+ engineers.
Oracle Certified Bar Raiser; conducted 100+ interviews and contributed to 25+ hires.
First student from Lovely Professional University to receive a direct SDE full-time offer from Amazon during third-year on-campus internship hiring.

Mentored and judged 10 AI-focused teams at OraHacks; one mentored team won with CodeAtlas, a local-first code knowledge graph that scans repositories, stores structural relationships in SQLite, and provides bounded retrieval for AI-assisted development.
